SEARCH
Package org.gradle.tooling.events.problems

Interface ProblemDefinition

@Incubating public interface ProblemDefinition
Represents a problem definition.
Since:
8.9

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DocumentationLink
    getDocumentationLink()
    A link to the documentation for this problem.
    ProblemId
    getId()
    The id of the problem.
    Severity
    getSeverity()
    Problem severity.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      ProblemId getId()
      The id of the problem.
      Returns:
      the id.
      Since:
      8.9

    • getSeverity

      Severity getSeverity()
      Problem severity.

      The severity of a problem is a hint to the user about how important the problem is. ERROR will fail the build, WARNING will not.

      Since:
      8.9

    • getDocumentationLink

      @Nullable DocumentationLink getDocumentationLink()
      A link to the documentation for this problem.
      Since:
      8.9
